utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these items are present. Each item is populated with appropriate details: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health coverage information plus costs; (2) property_coverage includes coverage description and costs; (3) travel_coverage includes coverage description and costs; (4) additional_services includes service details and cost information; (5) total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown as well as savings. All items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four main coverages: physical health, mental health, property, and travel — all under the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan'. According to the ground-truth ratings, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears under physical and mental health with a rating of 8, under property protection as 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' with a rating of 8, and under travel insurance as 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' with a rating of 7. Therefore, we map each selected component to its corresponding rating from the ground truth.
